log: === ROUND 1 ===

→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:17+3=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:20+-2=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:11+-2=9 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 1/3 targets affected.
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Khenra — Bardic Musician with Greatclub: [d20:11+6=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Khenra — Bardic Musician HP: 48/67
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Khenra — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:20+9=29 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 51 damage. Khenra — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
→ Khenra — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern! [CON save 12 vs DC 25]
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 1 rounds ===
